name: Zoho Apptics
description: Unified and actionable product analytics to monitor performance, analyze user behavior and collect feedback for mobile, web, and desktop apps with generous Free Forever plan

name: Doqlo
description: Bulk fill and mail merge PDF forms from CSV using the web app or Public API

name: Knocket
description: Free-forever live chat widget you add with one script tag, plus a shareable contact page and a unified Telegram/email inbox

name: HimitsuShell
description: A shell script DRM compiler that converts shell scripts into obfuscated binaries using an embedded shell interpreter and anti-debugging (alternative to shc)

name: custom-highlight
description: A Vue directive for styling arbitrary text within elements using the CSS Custom Highlight API
